code: import React,{useState,useRef,useEffect}from'react';import"../styles/CustomSection.css";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";{/*CustomSection recibe el parametro children, donde ira alojado todo lo que se desee introducir dentro de dicha seccion.*/}{/*CustomSection permite ocultar secciones teniendo en cuenta el rango de vision del usuario.*/}function CustomSection(_ref){let{children,forceShow}=_ref;const sectionRef=useRef(null);const[isVisible,setIsVisible]=useState(forceShow);useEffect(()=>{const observer=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(entry=>{setIsVisible(entry.isIntersecting);});},{threshold:0});if(sectionRef.current){observer.observe(sectionRef.current);}return()=>{if(sectionRef.current){observer.unobserve(sectionRef.current);}};},[forceShow]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{ref:sectionRef,className:"Section ".concat(isVisible?'Show':'Hide'),children:children});}export default CustomSection;
